# Modernize plan

This plan describes the modernization goals for the Atessa-Seguridad project.

## Goal

Make the project easier to maintain and safer by improving architecture, documenting the app, and fixing backend security.

## What to do

- Review the PHP backend and frontend files.
- Identify security improvements and best practices.
- Create clear task steps to update code and documentation.
- Keep the app working the same while improving the structure.
